title: tulipa oculus-solis var. allepica
intro: Tulipa oculus-solis var. allepica, also known as the 'Eastern Star' or 'Easter Star' tulip, is a variety of the oculus-solis tulip, a species of flowering plant in the lily family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion, alleviate symptoms of fever, and treat various respiratory issues. The health benefits of Tulipa oculus-solis var. allepica include its potential to reduce inflammation, lower blood pressure, and act as an expectorant to relieve congestion. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying the flowers and using them in teas, infusions, or tinctures, although its use should be carefully monitored due to potential toxicity and interactions with other medications.
